message:
Last winter, we found ourselves snowed in for a few days. With the power out and no Wi-Fi, I was worried we’d all spiral into boredom. But instead, we rediscovered the joy of low-tech fun! We dug out board games, built a blanket fort, and even tried our hand at storytelling by candlelight. It was such a sweet reminder that sometimes, the best moments come from the simplest things. 

As we gear up for whatever the weather throws our way this season, I’m reminded that a little preparation can lead to a lot of fun! Have you rediscovered any low-tech hobbies lately?
